heading: Administrative services and support
label: 5422 Administrative services and support

children.heading: Provision of support by Secretary
children.label: a Provision of support by Secretary

children.text: may provide personnel, facilities, and other administrative support services to the Foundation;
may provide funds to reimburse the travel expenses of the members of the Board under ; andsection 5421 of this title

children.heading: Reimbursements
children.label: b Reimbursements
children.text: Reimbursements accepted under subsection (a)(3) of this section shall be deposited in the Treasury to the credit of the appropriations then current and chargeable for the cost of providing services described in subsection (a)(1) of this section and the travel expenses described in subsection (a)(2) of this section.

children.heading: Continuation of certain services
children.label: c Continuation of certain services
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this section, the Secretary may continue to provide facilities and necessary support services to the Foundation after the termination of the 5-year period specified in subsection (a) of this section, on a space available, reimbursable cost basis.
